code: export const THEMES=[{id:"grove",label:"Neon Grove"},{id:"dark",label:"Dark Matter"},{id:"noir",label:"Noir Gold"},{id:"rose",label:"Rose Quartz"},{id:"cobalt",label:"Cobalt Wave"},{id:"glacier",label:"Glacier Mint"}];export const DEFAULT_THEME="cobalt";export const isValidTheme=value=>THEMES.some(theme=>theme.id===value);
